name: Northwest Consumer Law Center
description_short: Northwest Consumer Law Center is a credit repair provider based in Seattle, Washington. Rated 4.0/5 with 17 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Northwest Consumer Law Center is a credit repair provider serving clients in Seattle, Washington. Carrying a 4.0/5.0 Google rating from 17 reviews, Northwest Consumer Law Center has an strong reputation among consumers in the Seattle area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Northwest Consumer Law Center specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Seattle, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Northwest Consumer Law Center operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Seattle, Washington area who are considering Northwest Consumer Law Center should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
